text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since it's Valentine's Day tomorrow, I decide to
give Narita Taishin a present.
choice_data_list:
But what should I get her since she doesn't like
candy?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I end up picking out some cookies coated in
bitter chocolate and head back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's that?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? Oh... That's today?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No... Well, maybe. Kind of.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I don't really exchange chocolate with friends or
anything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hang on, is that seriously for me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Huh. Okay.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh... Thanks, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, while I'm relaxing in my room, there's
a knock at the door.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey... You in there?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Have you had dinner yet? If not, I brought you
some food.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stare at Taishin in confusion and notice that
she's holding a container filled with a dry curry
dish.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I haven't eaten yet, so I'm starving, and I happily
accept the food. Still...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And not only that...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Why are you acting like it's some kind of huge
shock?
choice_data_list:
Because I didn't know you were such a good
cook!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Not really. I just learned how to cook since my
family runs a business. My parents were too busy
to look after me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to make such a big deal about it.
It's just a dry curry...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not lying or exaggerating. The curry has a
mellow sweetness and depth to it that makes me
wonder if it has some secret ingredient.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess that's better than being told it
tastes disgusting.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I've got a curfew to keep. Later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin runs off as if desperate to leave.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The taste of the curry leaves a lingering hint of
sweetness in my mouth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm so hungry and the curry is so amazing that I
clean my plate before realizing it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah, no problem.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A brief silence hangs in the air.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Say...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You know that thing you said about me believing
in myself?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I once told her that I'd believe in her as long as
necessary until she believed in herself too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And I would believe in her even if it took a
lifetime.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well... Hypothetically speaking...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What if I said that I believe in myself now?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What would you do?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Would you call it quits because you've done your
job, and that's it? You're gone?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't say it in so many words, but I guess if
she's gained confidence in herself, then that's
enough.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open my mouth to speak, but she interrupts me
before I can get the words out.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No, don't say anything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Not yet. I don't want to hear it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sorry. I'm going back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin runs off as if desperate to leave.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The taste of the curry leaves a hint of bitterness
in my mouth.
